migrations.description: Consolidates any remaining legacy releaseTag* flat properties into the nested releaseTag object. The flat properties were removed in Nx 23.
migrations.name: 23-0-0-consolidate-release-tag-config

migrations.description: Rename imports of `createNodesV2` from `@nx/vitest` to the canonical `createNodes` export.
migrations.name: update-23-0-0-migrate-create-nodes-v2-import

migrations.description: Safety net: ensure any remaining @nx/vite:test executor usages are swapped to @nx/vitest:test and @nx/vitest is installed.
migrations.name: ensure-vitest-package-migration-23

migrations.description: Rename `rollupOptions` to `rolldownOptions` in vite config files (top-level and inside `environments`). Vite 8 replaced Rollup with Rolldown.
migrations.name: rename-rollup-options-to-rolldown-options

migrations.description: Create AI Instructions to help migrate users workspaces past breaking changes for Vite 8.
migrations.name: create-ai-instructions-for-vite-8

migrations.description: Migrate workspaces past breaking changes for Vitest 3.
migrations.name: migrate-to-vitest-3

migrations.description: Migrate workspaces past breaking changes for Vitest 4.
migrations.name: migrate-to-vitest-4

migrations.description: Rename imports of `createNodesV2` from `@nx/vite/plugin` to the canonical `createNodes` export.
migrations.name: update-23-0-0-migrate-create-nodes-v2-import

migrations.description: Rewrites `@nx/js/src/*` subpath imports to the new `@nx/js/internal` entry. The `./src/*` wildcard has been removed from `@nx/js`'s exports map; `@nx/js/src/release/version-actions` is preserved as a non-wildcard entry for back-compat with existing nx.json release configs. If a rewritten import resolves to a symbol that lives on the public `@nx/js` entry (e.g. `libraryGenerator`, `extractTsConfigBase`, `resolvePathsBaseUrl`), change the specifier to `@nx/js`.
migrations.name: 23-0-0-rewrite-internal-subpath-imports

migrations.description: Rename imports of `createNodesV2` from `@nx/js/typescript` to the canonical `createNodes` export.
migrations.name: update-23-0-0-migrate-create-nodes-v2-import

migrations.description: Rewrites imports of `@nx/workspace/src/utilities/typescript/compilation` to `@nx/js/internal`, where the module now lives.
migrations.name: 23-0-0-move-typescript-compilation-import

migrations.description: Rewrites `@nx/node/src/*` subpath imports now that the `./src/*` subpath is no longer exposed by `@nx/node`'s exports map. Named imports/exports of public symbols are routed to `@nx/node` and the rest to the new `@nx/node/internal` entry; `require`, dynamic `import` and `jest.mock` calls reference the whole module and are routed to `@nx/node/internal`.
migrations.name: rewrite-node-internal-subpath-imports

migrations.description: Split @nx/angular:ngrx generator defaults in nx.json across the @nx/angular:ngrx-root-store and @nx/angular:ngrx-feature-store generators.
migrations.name: update-23-0-0-migrate-ngrx-generator-defaults

migrations.description: Rename imports of `createNodesV2` from `@nx/angular/plugin` to the canonical `createNodes` export.
migrations.name: update-23-0-0-migrate-create-nodes-v2-import

migrations.description: Rewrites the now-removed deep `@nx/angular/src/utils`, `@nx/angular/src/generators/utils` and `@nx/angular/src/generators/move/move-impl` subpath imports to the new `@nx/angular/internal` entry. The executor/builder/generator schema and impl subpaths remain available and are left untouched.
migrations.name: rewrite-angular-internal-subpath-imports
